title: Kimari SFT Dataset Entry
description: Schema for Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) training data entries in JSONL format. Each line in an SFT dataset file must be a valid JSON object conforming to this schema.

messages.description: Ordered list of conversation turns. Must contain at least one user-assistant exchange.

role.description: The role of the speaker in this conversation turn.

content.description: The content of this conversation turn.

source.description: Origin of this data point. Must be a traceable, descriptive source identifier — not 'unknown'.

license.description: License under which this data is shared. Must be a valid SPDX identifier or well-known license name — not 'unknown'.

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and organization. Use lowercase, hyphenated format.
